title: limonium paulayanum
intro: Limonium paulayanum, also known as the Paulayan sea lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like limonene and beta-caryophyllene, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Consuming the plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In traditional herbal medicine, Limonium paulayanum is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
